name: slop-review
description: Detect low-quality AI-generated code using a 3-lens parallel review architecture with model-tiered agents. Scans for AI authorship signals, idiom violations, and code quality issues.

interface.longDescription: Use slop-review to inspect code for AI authorship signals, idiom breaks, and low-quality patterns using a three-lens review workflow that focuses on actionable quality issues.
defaultPrompt: Review this diff for AI slop and idiom violations
Scan this code for low-quality AI-generated patterns
Summarize the strongest slop-review findings in this patch
